headline: Agent memory and Claude Code workflows break out as builders wire persistent knowledge systems into AI coding agents.
body: Agent memory, Claude Code, and prompting all break out together, anchored by tutorials on power phrases for Claude Code and on building a self-improving Hermes knowledge base that uses an Obsidian vault, knowledge graphs, and cron-driven ingestion to scale beyond the base context window [0][2]. MCP, design systems, and knowledge graphs enter as new concepts, with IBM tying MCP and AI agents to context engineering for consistent software builds [1]. On the infrastructure side, Xiaomi and TileRT released MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model hitting over 1,000 tokens per second via FP4 quantization and speculative decoding [4]. Government regulation surges on reports that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 were shut down by US government order days after release [5][6].
